description_long: This lantern features a tall, rectangular frame with a dark wood or metal structure, enclosing cream-colored panels on all four sides. Each panel is adorned with a delicate painted design of a blossoming cherry tree branch, with pink and purple flowers adding a touch of elegance. The top of the lantern is open, suggesting it is designed to hold a light source within. The overall construction is sturdy, with four straight legs extending down from the corners, giving it a slightly elevated stance. The decorative panels are the main visual highlight, providing both aesthetic appeal and a diffused surface for light. This lantern would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or garden pathways, serving both functional and decorative purposes.
description: A tall, rectangular lantern with dark framing and cream panels featuring painted cherry blossom branches. The open top and elegant floral design make it both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cherry blossom branch design on the cream panel, framed by dark wood or metal.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the cherry blossom design continuing seamlessly across the panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same floral motif, with the branch and blossoms visible on the cream panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cherry blossom design, with slight variation in the branch's position.
